summary.title: TicTacDoh Function-Level Threat Model
summary.description: Function-level data flow diagram for the local Python desktop application TicTacDoh. Runtime logic is implemented mainly in tictactoe.py, using tkinter for the GUI, SQLite for local persistence, JSON save files under savegames/, and trusted in-memory runtime state.

diagrams.description: Function-level DFD for TicTacDoh as a local desktop application. No network or cloud components are included.
diagrams.title: TicTacDoh Function-Level DFD

data.name: User Input to Application Logic
data.description: Boundary crossed when usernames, passwords, move selections, opponent credentials, and game IDs enter trusted application logic from GUI input.

data.name: Application Logic to Local Persistence
data.description: Boundary crossed when the application reads or writes SQLite and JSON save data on the local filesystem.

text.text: Local Persistence to Trusted Runtime State

data.name: Local Persistence to Trusted Runtime State
data.description: Boundary crossed when saved JSON or database-derived state influences active in-memory session and gameplay state.

data.name: Local User / Player
data.description: Human user interacting with the local tkinter application through dialogs, buttons, and board clicks.

data.name: Bootstrap application
data.description: __main__ -> tk.Tk() -> TicTacToe.__init__(). Creates the root window, initialises paths and state, then invokes startup routines.

data.name: Initialise persistent storage
data.description: _init_db() -> _init_savegame_folder(). Creates or opens tictactoe.db and ensures savegames/ exists.

data.name: Create account
data.description: show_create_account() -> create_account() -> _hash_password(). Captures username and password and inserts a new user record.

data.name: Authenticate primary user
data.description: show_login() -> authenticate_user(). Verifies username and password against the users table and sets current_user on success.

data.name: Authenticate opponent and start game
data.description: show_opponent_dialog() -> authenticate_user() -> play_game(). Verifies the second player and initialises a fresh game.

data.name: Render and manage board state
data.description: display_game_board() -> on_button_click() -> make_move() -> is_winner() / is_board_full() / switch_player(). Renders the board, accepts moves, updates the board, and handles turns.

data.name: Save current game state
data.description: on_save_game() -> save_game(). Serialises board state, players, current turn, and timestamp to savegames/<game_id>.json.

data.name: Load saved game state
data.description: show_load_game_dialog() -> load_game(). Reads savegames/<game_id>.json and restores board, player_x, player_o, current_player, and game_id into active state.

text.text:
Record match result
and update statistics

data.name: Record match result and update statistics
data.description: end_game(). Inserts a games row and updates users.wins and users.losses based on winner or tie.

data.name: Retrieve and display scoreboard
data.description: get_scoreboard() -> show_scoreboard(). Queries usernames, wins, and losses and displays the scoreboard.

data.name: In-memory Runtime State
data.description: Trusted in-memory state: current_user, opponent, board, current_player, game_state, game_id.

data.name: tictactoe.db
data.description: SQLite database storing users(username, password_hash, wins, losses, created_at) and games(id, player_x, player_o, winner, created_at).

data.name: savegames/
data.description: Local directory containing JSON save files created during gameplay.

data.name: savegames/<game_id>.json
data.description: JSON save file storing game_id, board, player_x, player_o, current_player, and timestamp.

data.name: startup state
data.description: Initial board, current_player, game_state, and path configuration stored in memory during application bootstrap.

data.name: startup calls
data.description: __init__() invokes storage initialisation routines.

data.name: create/open DB schema
data.description: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS for users and games in tictactoe.db.

data.name: create directory
data.description: Ensures savegames/ exists before gameplay save/load operations.
